title: Papuasicyos arfakensis

It is classified as a species of flowering plant, specifically within the genus Papuasicyos. The classification of Papuasicyos arfakensis also places it within the order Cucurbitales, a group of plants characterized by their use of the flower type known as the Cucurbitiflorae.
